digest.component_or_area: trusted-environment key config loader + required-environment gate check
propositions: A config loader reads trusted-environment public keys from the out-of-band, review-gated .rebar/trusted_environments.yaml file (never the auto-pushed tickets branch) and validates its schema.
An absent config file or missing require_environment defaults to no required environment, making local certs records rather than controls.
A per-gate require_environment names one env_id that must produce the certificate for the gate.
A certificate from an environment not in the pinned set fails the required-environment check.
The check verifies signatures against the pinned key for the required env_id, never the certificate's self-claimed keyid, so a cert claiming a pinned env but signed by a different key fails.
Era-validity over added_at_commit/revoked_at_commit is implemented in child 368c and consumed by this check.
